---
pagetitle: "Teaching · Sushovan Majhi"
title: ""
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<header class="masthead page">
  <div class="kicker">Sushovan Majhi</div>
  <div class="pub-title">Teaching</div>
  <div class="edition">
    <span>The George Washington University</span>
    <span>Department of Data Science</span>
  </div>
</header>
```

A pedagogy that runs from foundations to topological methods, taught at four institutions across three countries: foundations of data science, statistics, machine learning, computer science, and topological data analysis.

#### Currently teaching, Spring 2026

```{=html}
<ul class="roster-list">
  <li>
    <span class="r-name">Algorithm Design (DATS 6001)</span>
    <span class="r-affil">Graduate · GWU</span>
    <span class="r-topic"><a href="https://6001-majhi.datasci.land">Course website</a> &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; password-protected; contact for access.</span>
  </li>
  <li>
    <span class="r-name">Data Science Capstone (DATS 4001)</span>
    <span class="r-affil">Undergraduate · GWU</span>
  </li>
</ul>
```

#### At The George Washington University

```{=html}
<ul class="roster-list">
  <li>
    <span class="r-name">Introduction to Data Mining (DATS 6103)</span>
    <span class="r-affil">Graduate · Fall 2023–current</span>
  </li>
  <li>
    <span class="r-name">Linear Algebra for Data Science</span>
    <span class="r-affil">Graduate · Summer 2024</span>
    <span class="r-topic"><a href="https://linalg.mathematics.land">Course website</a> &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; password-protected; contact for access.</span>
  </li>
  <li>
    <span class="r-name">Computer Science Foundations (DATS 6450)</span>
    <span class="r-affil">Graduate · Fall 2023</span>
  </li>
</ul>
```

#### Earlier

```{=html}
<ul class="roster-list">
  <li>
    <span class="r-name">Topological Data Analysis</span>
    <span class="r-affil">Graduate · NIT Sikkim · Fall 2023</span>
    <span class="r-topic"><a href="https://tda.mathematics.land">Course website</a>.</span>
  </li>
  <li>
    <span class="r-name">Statistics for Data Science (MIDS 203)</span>
    <span class="r-affil">Graduate · UC Berkeley · 2020–2023</span>
  </li>
  <li>
    <span class="r-name">Undergraduate Statistics for Business (MATH 1140)</span>
    <span class="r-affil">Undergraduate · Tulane · Summer 2019</span>
  </li>
  <li>
    <span class="r-name">Linear Algebra, Complex Analysis, Real Analysis</span>
    <span class="r-affil">Christ University · MES College · GATE-IIT, Bangalore · 2011–2013</span>
  </li>
</ul>
```

See the [teaching statement](../assets/teaching-statement.pdf) for the philosophy. For self-contained tutorials in data science and topology, see the [tutorials](../tutorials/) page.
